label: BrowserUse • login wall → open_login → retry
query: Go to https://fixtures.local/dashboard and report the account balance shown there.
notes: LIVE. The dashboard returns the structured LOGIN_REQUIRED failure on first navigate. The correct plan is browser_open_login (NEVER asking for credentials in chat) and then retrying the navigation — the world marks the host signed-in after open_login. Scores the verb order and the grounded balance in the digest.
